source_formulae: P0R03403: Experience is the Generative Model in Action:

P0R03404: The projection f = Psi-field x Neural_substrate is the physical process of the generative model creating its hypothesis about the world. The neural substrate provides the parameters of the model, and the Psi-field is the "energy" that illuminates it. The resulting "qualia" are the content of the prediction.

source_formulae: P0R03405: The Strange Loop is the Self-Model:

P0R03406: The equation I = Model(I) is the formal definition of a generative model that has become complex enough to include a model of itself as an agent. The emergence of a stable fixed point, I*, is the emergence of a stable "Self" prior. The subjective experience of being a self is the continuous process of the system using its model of itself to predict its own sensory input. "Observerhood" is what happens when the cosmic inference engine points its predictive machinery at itself.
